name: CardVille 1.0.53 Real Exit and Mobile Readable UI Layout
notes: Exit button attempts real window/app close only, removes blank-page fallback, enlarges mobile text, spreads village building columns across edge space, and applies selected UI-only reward burst polish.
label: Real exit + mobile readable UI + edge-spaced village
description: Fixes exit behavior, improves mobile legibility and layout spacing, keeps UI from crowding, and refreshes selected reward burst asset with alpha processing.
